hero.eyebrow: Ten islands · One people · One soul
hero.subtitle: Ten islands at the heart of the Atlantic. A people shaped by music, history, sea and morabeza.

islands.title: Ten Islands of the
islands.subtitle: From Barlavento to Sotavento, each island is a world. Choose yours and start discovering.

islandsPage.title: Ten Islands of the
islandsPage.subtitle: From Barlavento to Sotavento, each island is a world. Choose yours and start discovering.

diaspora.title: A People
diaspora.subtitle: Over 700,000 Cape Verdeans live outside the archipelago. The diaspora is part of the country's soul.

footer.tagline: Ten islands. One people. One soul.
footer.description: Digital portal dedicated to the culture, identity and tourism of Cape Verde.

meta.homeTitle: Nós Cabo Verde — Ten islands. One people. One soul.
meta.homeDesc: Digital portal of Cape Verdean culture, beauty and identity. Discover the ten islands, music, cuisine, people and authentic experiences of Cape Verde.
meta.islandsTitle: The Ten Islands of Cape Verde: complete guide to Barlavento and Sotavento
meta.islandsDesc: Explore the ten islands of Cape Verde: Santo Antão, São Vicente, São Nicolau, Sal, Boa Vista, Maio, Santiago, Fogo and Brava. Each island has its own personality, music and unique culture.
meta.experiencesTitle: Experiences in Cape Verde: trekking, kitesurfing, diving and culture
meta.experiencesDesc: Book authentic experiences in Cape Verde: trekking in Paul Valley, kitesurfing in Sal, diving in Santa Luzia, climbing Pico do Fogo and much more.
meta.diasporaTitle: Cape Verdean Diaspora: stories, communities and roots
meta.diasporaDesc: Discover the Cape Verdean diaspora: 700,000 Cape Verdeans spread across the world. Stories from Portugal, USA, France, the Netherlands and more.
